data.title: Medigene AG Reports Significant Share Capital Loss and Cash Runway Adjustment
data.description:
Medigene ( (DE:MDG1) ) just unveiled an update.

Medigene AG has announced a significant financial update, revealing a loss of more than half of its share capital, necessitating an Extraordinary General Meeting to formally report this to shareholders. Additionally, the company has adjusted its cash runway, moving it from July 2025 to May 2025, due to unmet milestone payments and income from contractual obligations. Despite these challenges, Medigene remains committed to maintaining its 2024 financial guidance for R&D expenses and revenues, and is actively seeking additional financing to sustain operations.

More about Medigene

Medigene AG is a biotechnology company based in Planegg/Martinsried, Germany. It focuses on the development of innovative immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer, leveraging its expertise in T cell receptor (TCR) technology.

YTD Price Performance: 50.40%

Average Trading Volume: 583

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €23.43M

data.title: Smart Capital S.p.A. Reports Strong 2024 Financial Growth and Successful Market Listing
data.description:
The latest update is out from Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ).

Smart Capital S.p.A. reported significant growth in its financial performance for 2024, with a 111% increase in net results attributable to the parent company compared to the previous year. The company successfully listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market, raising approximately 9 million euros and expanding its shareholder base to include over 100 entrepreneurial families and institutional investors. This strategic move, along with successful exits from several investments, has strengthened Smart Capital’s market position and provided substantial returns to its shareholders.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is a permanent capital industrial holding company specializing in Private Equity and Private Investments in Public Equity. The company focuses on investing in small and medium-sized enterprises with strong growth potential, and it operates within the financial services industry.

Average Trading Volume: 45,809

data.title: Haiki+ S.P.A. Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results and Strategic Growth Initiatives
data.description:
An announcement from Haiki+ S.P.A. ( (IT:HIK) ) is now available.

Haiki+ S.P.A. announced solid financial results for 2024, marking its first year as an independent entity following a corporate split. The company reported a production value of €204 million and an EBITDA of €31 million, with a margin of 15%. The board also approved a capital increase and a significant acquisition, reinforcing Haiki+’s commitment to growth and sustainability in the circular economy sector.

More about Haiki+ S.P.A.

Haiki+ S.P.A. operates in the circular economy industry, focusing on environmental sustainability and material enhancement. The company is involved in plant innovation and operates 22 production centers, positioning itself as a leader in strategic sectors of the circular economy.

data.title: Buhler Industries Completes Strategic Amalgamation and Plans TSX Delisting
data.description:
Buhler Industries ( (TSE:BUI) ) has issued an announcement.

Buhler Industries Inc. has completed an amalgamation with a subsidiary of ASKO Sinai ve Teknoloji Üretim Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Şirketi, forming a new entity that retains the name Buhler Industries Inc. This move, approved by a vast majority of shareholders, results in the conversion of public shares into redeemable preferred shares, subsequently redeemed for cash. The company plans to delist from the Toronto Stock Exchange and cease being a reporting issuer under Canadian securities laws, indicating a strategic shift in its market presence.

More about Buhler Industries

Buhler Industries Inc., headquartered in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada, is a publicly traded company on the TSX. It manufactures and distributes agricultural equipment through brands like Versatile, which offers tractors and tillage, and Farm King, which provides augers, mowers, and other implements. With facilities in Canada and the U.S., Buhler Industries has been a significant player in the agricultural sector for nearly a century, employing over 800 Canadians.

YTD Price Performance: 131.27%

Average Trading Volume: 1,981

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$182.1M

data.title: Grolleau Executes Share Buyback Program to Enhance Market Position
data.description:
The latest update is out from Grolleau ( (FR:ALGRO) ).

Grolleau has executed a share buyback program authorized by its shareholders, conducting transactions from March 25 to March 28, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategic efforts to enhance shareholder value and potentially improve its market positioning as it aims to more than double its turnover by 2025-26.

More about Grolleau

Grolleau is a French industrial company founded in 1950, specializing in infrastructure equipment for smart cities and territories, particularly with the deployment of 5G and connected objects. The company is a leader in outdoor equipment for critical technologies and is the top French manufacturer of urban cabinets and electric charging stations. Grolleau operates a comprehensive value chain from design to delivery and is present in France, Italy, China, and Mexico.

data.description:

BAWAG Group AG announced a series of share purchases by its CEO, Anas Abuzaakouk, as part of a managers’ transaction disclosure. The transactions, conducted on the Vienna Stock Exchange, involved the purchase of 15,000 shares at an average price of 94.33 EUR. This move reflects the CEO’s confidence in the company’s prospects and could positively influence stakeholder sentiment.

data.title: Prudential Launches $10 Billion Medium Term Note Programme
data.description:
Prudential ( (GB:PRU) ) has issued an announcement.

Prudential plc and Prudential Funding (Asia) plc have announced the approval and publication of a $10 billion Medium Term Note Programme prospectus by the Financial Conduct Authority. This development is significant as it highlights Prudential’s strategic financial operations and its commitment to strengthening its market position in Asia and Africa, potentially impacting stakeholders by enhancing the company’s funding capabilities.

More about Prudential

Prudential plc is a company that provides life and health insurance as well as asset management services across 24 markets in Asia and Africa. The company aims to be a trusted partner by offering simple and accessible financial and health solutions. It is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, the London Stock Exchange, the Singapore Stock Exchange, and the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Arogo Capital Delays 10-K Filing, No Financial Impact Expected
data.description:
Arogo Capital Acquisition Corp. Class A ( (AOGO) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Arogo Capital Acquisition Corp. Class A has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The delay is primarily due to the need for additional time to gather necessary information for the report’s preparation. The company expects to file the report within fifteen calendar days following the original due date. Importantly, Arogo Capital does not anticipate any significant changes in its financial results compared to the previous fiscal year. The notification is signed by Suradech Taweesaengsakulthai, the company’s Chief Executive Officer, who assures ongoing compliance efforts.

More about Arogo Capital Acquisition Corp. Class A

data.title: Drax Group Advances Share Buyback Program with Latest Purchase
data.description:
Drax Group plc ( (GB:DRX) ) has shared an update.

Drax Group plc has executed a share buyback transaction, purchasing 366,669 of its ordinary shares at an average price of 593.42 pence per share. This move is part of its ongoing share buyback program initiated in August 2024, aimed at consolidating its share capital and potentially enhancing shareholder value. Following this transaction, the company has 429,561,219 ordinary shares in issue, with 68,937,719 held in treasury, impacting the total voting rights available to shareholders.

More about Drax Group plc

Drax Group plc operates in the energy sector, focusing on renewable energy solutions and power generation. The company is known for its efforts in transitioning from coal to biomass and other sustainable energy sources, positioning itself as a leader in the renewable energy market.

data.title: Lotus Bakeries Announces 2025 General Meeting and Releases 2024 Annual Report
data.description:
Lotus Bakeries NV ( (GB:0F4O) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lotus Bakeries NV has announced its upcoming ordinary General Meeting for shareholders on May 13, 2025, and has published its 2024 Annual Report, which includes financial and sustainability information. The report and details about the meeting are available on the company’s website. This announcement underscores Lotus Bakeries’ commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement, reflecting its strong market presence and operational growth.

More about Lotus Bakeries NV

Lotus Bakeries, founded in 1932 in Lembeke, Belgium, operates globally in the traditional and natural snacks segment with brands like Lotus Biscoff, nākd, and TREK. Headquartered in Belgium, it has production facilities in several countries and a new facility under construction in Thailand. The company employs approximately 3,360 people and reported a turnover of 1,232.0 million euros in 2024. It is listed on Euronext Brussels, with the Boone and Stevens families holding the majority of shares.
